title: dicranopteris pubescens
intro: Dicranopteris pubescens, also known as the climbing fern, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dicranopteris pubescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by drying its leaves and stems, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
